title: Generating a Summary of a Meeting Transcript
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a summary of a meeting transcript, assuming it's a plain text document with the following format: Time: ... Person speaking: ... Discussion: ... The output should be a JSON object with the summary, along with the key points discussed. The prompt should be under 100 words and use a formal tone. There will be at least 5 minutes of meeting transcript.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt is under 100 words and uses a formal tone.
Check if the JSON syntax is valid and correctly formatted.
Check if the generated summary accurately captures the key points discussed in the meeting transcript.
